name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
enemies to lovers

you're enemies, always have been. Leon is running away with YOUR intel. Instead of handing the intel over, he dares you to shoot him.

you're working for different agencies, but you don't have to be "bad"... tbh DSO is kinda sus anyways

you really hate each other, it also took me an uncomfortable amount of time to think of funny taunt lines so pls appreciate my humor...

sowwy enemies to lovers is my comfort food hihi and no request for once
I wrote this high AF under benzos so i hope it's not to horrible but i thought the cinematography is chefs kiss
sending love out to all my fellow Leon creators, so many reached out to me in the DMs in a really rough place and I've been really enjoying myself. yall are really good at cheering me up!! More bots incoming, if u wanna chat with me on discord tho here is my tag: @belladonna.xoxo
im always happy to make new friends, hugs and kisses to the ones i already have!! your support is so amazing and it makes me hang on!
creator: Belladonna.xoxo
